label: v3 redesign — Studio surface
summary: Brownfield Pattern B prototype for ninochavez.co v3. Reframes the site as a practitioner studio surface (Nino Chavez ⊕ studio) rather than a personal site. Four primary pages: Home (architect-primary composition), Speaking (Conference Circuit funnel), Colophon (methodology meta-receipt), Now (live state mirror). All 8 structural differentiation moves + all 7 anti-slop commitments demonstrated.
primary_persona: P1 Peer Architect + P2 Prospective Client + P3 Conference Circuit
